fields.name: Standard Cost Worksheet Name
fields.tooltip: Contains the name of the Standard Cost Worksheet. You can create new worksheets if you choose the field and enter names and descriptions in the Standard Cost Wksh Names window.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of worksheet line.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the worksheet line.

fields.name: Implemented
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you have run the Implement Standard Cost Changes batch job.

fields.name: Replenishment System
fields.tooltip: Specifies the replenishment method for the items, for example, purchase or prod. order.

fields.name: Standard Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost that is used as an estimation to be adjusted with variances later. It is typically used in assembly and production where costs can vary.

fields.name: New Standard Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item's last purchase cost that includes indirect costs, such as freight that is associated with the purchase of the item.

fields.name: New Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip: Specifies the overhead rate.

fields.name: New Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Material Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the single-level material cost of the item.

fields.name: New Single-Lvl Material Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Cap. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the single-level capacity cost of the item.

fields.name: New Single-Lvl Cap. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Subcontrd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the single-level subcontracted cost of the item.

fields.name: New Single-Lvl Subcontrd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Cap. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the single-level capacity overhead cost of the item.

fields.name: New Single-Lvl Cap. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Mfg. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the single-level manufacturing overhead cost of the item.

fields.name: New Single-Lvl Mfg. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Rolled-up Material Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the rolled-up material cost of the item.

fields.name: New Rolled-up Material Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated rolled-up material cost based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Rolled-up Cap. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the rolled-up capacity cost of the item.

fields.name: New Rolled-up Cap. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Rolled-up Subcontrd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the rolled-up subcontracted cost of the item.

fields.name: New Rolled-up Subcontrd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Rolled-up Cap. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the rolled-up capacity overhead cost of the item.

fields.name: New Rolled-up Cap. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.

fields.name: Rolled-up Mfg. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the rolled-up manufacturing overhead cost of the item.

fields.name: New Rolled-up Mfg. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the updated value based on either the batch job or what you have entered manually.
